director.tagline_zh: 遊戲廣告 × 商業影像導演
director.bio_zh: 鄭又勛（York）是台灣的遊戲廣告與商業影像導演。9 年來執導超過 100 個案子、產出逾 1000 支影音交付物，客戶橫跨 Schick舒適牌、王品集團、GODIVA、Google Play、茶裏王等消費品牌，以及斗羅大陸、天龍八部2、新仙俠：起源、失落的方舟等國際知名遊戲 IP。作品類型橫跨真人實拍、CG特效到AI生成影像等多元技術路線，從創意腳本、拍攝執行到後期製作皆一手包辦。
director.bio_en: York Cheng is a Taiwan-based director specializing in game advertising and commercial film. Over 9 years, he has directed 100+ projects and delivered 1,000+ final video assets for clients spanning consumer brands — Schick, Wang Steak Group, GODIVA, Google Play, and Tea's Tea — alongside internationally recognized game IPs including Soul Land, Tian Long Ba Bu 2, Xin Xianxia: Qiyuan, and Lost Ark. His work spans live-action production, CG effects, and AI-generated imagery, with hands-on involvement from creative scripting and production through post.

works.title_zh: 舒適牌 Schick HydroPRO 磁浮刮鬍刀 OTV
works.desc_zh: 為國際刮鬍刀品牌 Schick 執導的電視廣告，完整走過腳本、PPM、定裝到拍攝的商業製作流程。
works.desc_en: A commercial TVC for international razor brand Schick, taken through the full production pipeline from script and PPM to costume fitting and shoot.
works.concept_zh: 這支片的方向只有一件事：讓看不見的磁浮，變成你眼睛真的看得到的東西——扛住這件事的主角，自始至終是那把刮鬍刀。方向定了，光就跟著定。我把舞台收成一片純黑，把所有會搶戲的資訊全拿掉，再讓藍色成為畫面裡唯一的顏色——它既是舒適的品牌色，也是「磁浮」這股能量的化身；刀身在黑底上自己懸浮、旋轉，金屬邊緣只用一道硬光勾出輪廓，先讓你把產品看乾淨。真正的關鍵在刀貼上臉頰的瞬間，刀頭周圍亮起一圈藍光；鏡頭再推進到皮膚微距，這裡我特意讓膚色維持溫暖的肉色，冷冽的藍色光跡劃過時才跳得出來——一暖一冷，「磁浮」就這樣從規格表上的名詞，變成你眼睛裡真的看到的事。連畫面裡的人也是為這把刀服務的：他跟產品用同一種低角度側光、同一片黑背景打亮，所以不會破壞這個世界。水絲沖過刀刃、91% 的字卡、他側光下那抹滿意的半笑，全在襯這把刀，沒有一格跟它搶戲。
works.concept_en: This film has one direction and one only — to turn the invisible, magnetic levitation, into something your eyes can actually see; and the hero carrying that job, first frame to last, is the razor itself. Once the direction is set, the light follows it. I pulled the stage down to pure black and stripped out everything that could fight for attention, then let blue become the only colour in the frame — it is both Schick's brand colour and the physical embodiment of that "maglev" energy. The blade floats and turns on its own against the black, a single hard edge of light tracing its metal contour, so first you get to see the product clean. The real moment comes when the blade meets the cheek: a ring of blue light flares around the head; the camera pushes into a macro of the skin, where I deliberately keep the flesh warm and human-toned, so the cold blue trail only leaps out as the edge glides through — warm against cold, and "maglev" turns from a word on a spec sheet into something you literally watch happen. Even the person in the frame serves the razor: he is lit with the same low, raking side-light and set against the same black as the product, so he never breaks the world. The water rinsing the blade, the "91%" caption, that faint satisfied half-smile under the side-light — all of it is there to set off this one blade, and not a single frame steals the scene from it.

works.desc_zh: 為知名飲料品牌茶裏王執導《客棧圍攻篇》，官方頻道累積近 200 萬觀看。
works.desc_en: Directed "Inn Siege," a spot for popular tea brand Tea's Tea that has drawn nearly 2 million views on its official channel.
works.concept_zh: 這支片的方向只有一個賭注：整支片必須讓你真心以為在看一場武俠打鬥，最後一秒的拆穿才會成立——而它藏起來的，不過是「一群人夠不夠喝」這種再日常不過的小事。方向既然是「要像一場真的打鬥」，攝影就整套借武俠片的語法來打：反派用低角度仰拍壓上來，鏡頭前緣總擺著持刀配角的身體、把白衣主角框在正中間，有人翻身躍過樑柱那幾顆則用手持的晃動和殘影衝出殺氣。美術也一步不讓——木格窗、紅燈籠、手寫布招、一身泥土色的粗布戲服，把「茶客棧」做成一間你會相信的客棧；而主角一襲白衣，是滿畫面唯一乾淨明亮的人，被十來把刀劍圍成半圈時，他一個人穩穩坐在正中央，這份反差本身就是戲。反派一聲「都進來」，你等的是開打；主角只回一句「夠嗎」——這句是整個陷阱的樞紐：你以為他在問打不打得過，反派卻放下殺氣，舉起一大瓶茶灌了一口，「有大瓶的當然夠」。關鍵在於，那兩瓶茶從頭到尾就用跟刀劍一樣的暖光去打、擺在同一個世界裡，所以當「兵器」變成茶、翻轉才一點都不突兀。原來這群人不是來打架，是來喝茶的。用喝茶這個動作、而不是一行字卡去完成翻轉，才是這支片真正高明的地方。收在「歡聚一起乾 大瓶超回甘」和兩瓶 1250ml 上。
works.concept_en: This film's direction is really a single bet — it has to make you genuinely believe you are watching a wuxia brawl, so that the reveal in the last second lands, and all it is actually hiding is something as everyday as "is there enough tea to go around." Since the direction is "make it look like a real fight," the camera borrows the whole grammar of a martial-arts movie: the villain shot from a low angle bearing down on you, a knife-wielding extra's body always planted in the foreground to frame the white-robed hero dead centre, and the beats where someone vaults over a beam shot handheld, with shake and blur to throw off menace. The art department gives no ground either — lattice windows, red lanterns, hand-painted cloth signs, earthy coarse-cloth costumes build a teahouse-inn you would actually believe; and the hero, all in white, is the one clean, bright figure in the frame, sitting calmly at the exact centre while a dozen blades close into a half-circle — that contrast alone is the drama. The villain calls "all of you, in," and you brace for the fight; the hero only answers "is it enough?" — the hinge of the whole trap: you think he is asking whether he can win, but the villain drops his killing intent, lifts a big bottle of tea and takes a swig — "with the big bottle, of course it's enough." The key is that those two bottles were lit from the start with the exact same warm light as the swords and placed in the same world, so when the "weapons" turn out to be tea, the twist doesn't feel like a cheat at all. Turns out this crowd didn't come to fight — they came to drink. Finishing the reversal with the act of drinking, instead of a line of caption, is where this film is truly clever. It lands on "歡聚一起乾 大瓶超回甘" and two 1250ml bottles.

works.title_zh: Google Play 台灣廣告《就差一點》
works.desc_zh: 為 Google Play 台灣執導的品牌廣告《就差一點》，官方頻道累積超過 42 萬觀看。
works.desc_en: Directed the Google Play Taiwan brand campaign "So Close," which has drawn over 420K views on the official YouTube channel.
works.concept_zh: 這支片的方向只有一個：用「就差一點」這種每個玩家都懂的心情當主線。因為要賣的通用點數不綁任何一款遊戲、抓不到一個具體畫面，我乾脆不去拍點數，改去拍那份人人都有的心情。方向定了，鏡頭就分成三種輪流上：一種是暖光化妝間裡，一個人對著手機又緊張又不甘的個人焦慮；一種是純黑背景、冷藍光打在臉上，一群人擠著看同一支手機的集體屏息；還有一種乾脆跳出手機，直接讓遊戲自己的過場特效——火焰金光的《七騎士 Re:Birth》、藍調精煉的《星痕共鳴》——滿版炸出來。三種畫面各有各的力道，卻都在講同一份「就差一點」。美術上，兩位素人不是最後才登場，而是一路長出來的：先混在圍觀人群裡當普通玩家，中段換上電競打扮，最後才站到霓虹「鑽之道」招牌下，對鏡頭指出來喊話。這個從路人升格成主角的過程，本身就是在演——這組點數，把每一款遊戲裡的你都接了起來。
works.concept_en: This film has one direction: take "so close" — a feeling every gamer knows — and run it as the spine. The points it's selling work across every game and are tied to none, so there's no single image to hang them on; my answer was to stop shooting the points and shoot that shared feeling instead. Once the direction is set, the shooting splits into three registers that take turns. One is personal anxiety — warm-lit dressing-room, one person hunched over a phone, tense and unwilling to lose. One is collective breath-holding — pure black background, cold blue light on the faces, a crowd pressed in around a single phone. And one leaves the phone behind entirely, letting each game's own cutscene detonate full-frame — the fire-and-gold of Seven Knights Re:Birth, the blue refinement glow of Blue Protocol. Three kinds of image, each with its own punch, all telling the same "so close." In the art, the two everyday leads aren't saved for the end; they grow into the film — first blending into the watching crowd as ordinary players, then switching to an esports look mid-way, and only then stepping under the neon "鑽之道" sign to point straight at camera and call out. That climb from bystander to lead is itself the pitch: these points connect every version of you, across every game.

works.views_note_en: Director's cut from the channel archive
works.desc_zh: 為國際巧克力品牌 GODIVA 執導的品牌影片。
works.desc_en: A brand film directed for international chocolate label GODIVA.
works.concept_zh: 這支片的方向只有一件事：把一盒巧克力放大到整座城市的尺度，讓精品巧克力不只是好吃，而是一件值得抬頭仰望的事——全程不靠人臉、不靠旁白，只靠奇觀和血統。方向是「要讓人仰望」，攝影就壓低鏡頭：深藍雪夜、對稱單點透視的大街延伸到中央地標高塔，鏡頭貼著地面往上仰。開場那道劃過夜空的金色流光只是引子，真正要你看的，是被串成巨型聖誕吊飾、懸在高塔正上方的那串 GODIVA 巧克力。色彩我只留深藍與金：藍是夜與精品的冷靜，金是巧克力、街燈與馬車標誌的貴氣。美術最關鍵的一步，是讓全片三種畫面都用同一組藍、金、雪色扣住：畫繪感的城市奇觀→燙金線稿的低多邊形馴鹿與比利時老城剪影（交代 Belgium 1926 血統）→深藍底的寫實產品攝影。顏色是同一套，「大到不可能的畫面」和「櫃上帶得走的盒子」才會像同一個世界。全片沒有一張人臉，唯一的主角就是品牌自己的馬車標誌。
works.concept_en: This film's direction is a single thing: scale a box of chocolate up to the size of a whole city, so premium chocolate stops being merely tasty and becomes something you look up at — and do it with no human face and not one line of voiceover, on spectacle and pedigree alone. The direction is "make them look up," so the camera drops low: a deep-navy snowy city, a symmetrical one-point-perspective boulevard running all the way to the landmark tower at centre, the lens almost grazing the ground and tilting up. The streak of gold light crossing the night sky at the open is just the cue; what it really wants you to see is the string of GODIVA chocolates built into a giant Christmas ornament, hung directly above the tower. I kept only two colours: deep navy and gold — navy for the calm of night and luxury, gold for the chocolate, the street lamps, and the brand's horse-and-carriage crest. The most important art move is to hold all three of the film's registers together in that one navy-gold-snow palette: first the painterly city spectacle, then a shift to gilded line-art — low-poly gold reindeer and a silhouette of old Belgian rowhouses that spell out the Belgium 1926 lineage — and finally a settle back onto straight product photography on the same navy ground (tree- and bear-shaped tins, the rectangular gift box). Because the colour is one system, the "impossibly big image" and "the box on the shelf you can actually take home" read as events in the same world. Not one human face appears; the only lead is the brand's own horse-and-carriage crest.

works.views_note: 頻道 Shorts 三部曲(壹/貳/參之型)
works.views_note_en: A three-part Shorts series on the director's channel
works.desc_zh: 為王品集團新餐飲品牌「肉次方」執導的品牌廣告。
works.desc_en: A brand commercial directed for Wang Steak Group's new dining concept, Rou Ci Fang.
works.concept_zh: 這支片的方向，是把「肉夠不夠嫩」這件小事，當成一門要修煉的武功來拍——所以整支 AI 生成的片，我讓它長成一齣武館格鬥。方向既然是武功，美術就把品牌的肉身分縫進武林：虎紋卡其道服、紅頭巾、印上「肉道黑帶」的戰袍，還有一整塊油花牛肉供在武館長廊正中央，像鎮派聖物。攝影讓兩種溫度對打：報幕字卡與窗格的紅煙紅光是招式殺氣，天窗的鋼冷天光是武館肅穆。每段「型」都照同一套副歌走：紅霧報幕（壹之型、貳之型、參之型各報一招）→供奉牛肉→師徒 VS→雷電動作→插進全片唯一寫實的超微距切肉：刀刃劃開油花那一下，我特意用最自然的光拍、跳出 CG 感，把抽象的「軟嫩」錨回嚥得下口水的真畫面→收在爐火品牌卡。中間故意讓畫風對撞——寫實武館、2D 遊戲卡、紀實切肉——不搭調本身就是笑點，但每格都用紅與肉色扣住。打到一半兩人四目相對、滿版愛心飄出，把殺氣揉回吃到飽的輕鬆。用武功心法的架子裝吃到飽燒肉店的賣點，誇張自嘲，但每個梗都指回「肉」。
works.concept_en: This film's direction is to take something as small as "is the meat tender enough" and shoot it as a martial art you have to train for — so the whole AI-generated spot is built, top to bottom, to look like a dojo fighting game. The direction is "make it a discipline," so the art department sews the brand's meat identity straight into the martial world: tiger-striped tan gi, red headbands, fight-jackets reading "肉道黑帶 / 肉次方 POWER of MEAT," and a whole marbled cut of beef enshrined at the centre of a dojo corridor like the sect's sacred relic. Camera and colour set two temperatures against each other — the red mist and red-lit lattice windows of the title cards are the fight's killing intent; the steely cold god-rays from the skylights are the dojo's solemnity. Every "Form" runs the same chorus: red-mist announce card (Form One, the Grain Cuts Back; Form Two, Golden Section; Form Three, the Temperature-Controlled Cut) → the enshrined beef → master-versus-disciple → lightning action → then the one photoreal register in the whole film, a hyper-close macro of the blade opening the marbling, which I deliberately shoot out of the CG look, in the most natural light, to anchor the abstract idea of "tenderness" to a real, mouth-watering image → and it lands on a grill-fire brand card. In between I let the styles collide on purpose — photoreal AI dojo, fully 2D game VS card and lightning illustration, documentary-real slicing — and the mismatch itself is the joke, but every frame is keyed to red and meat-tone so it never falls apart. Halfway through a fight the two lock eyes and hearts flood the frame, folding the menace back into a buffet's easy mood. It borrows the entire scaffold of a martial-arts discipline to carry an all-you-can-eat grill's pitch — broad, self-aware, and every gag points back to the meat.

works.views_note: 原配對誤植為競品版本（林志穎、坤達、鳳小岳三人合演的官方TVC，108萬觀看，非本案）。已依鄭又勛導演作品頻道 cX7d8eiJfz8 說明欄核實：導演鄭又勛／代言人林志穎（僅一人）；查無對應的官方高觀看版本，故觀看數不顯示，available on request
works.views_note_en: The original pairing mislabeled a competing version (an official TVC co-starring Jimmy Lin, Kunda, and Rhydian Vaughan, 1.08M views — not this case). Verified via York Cheng's director channel description for cX7d8eiJfz8: director York Cheng, single endorser Jimmy Lin only; no matching high-view official version was found, so the view count is not shown — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為經典武俠 IP《天龍八部2》執導廣告，由林志穎代言（依導演頻道說明欄核實，非坊間流傳的三人版）。
works.desc_en: Directed the commercial for classic wuxia IP Tian Long Ba Bu 2, featuring endorser Jimmy Lin (verified via the director's own channel description; not the widely-circulated three-endorser cut).
works.concept_zh: 這支片賣的是「金庸正版授權」，但我一開始就決定：不靠打鬥、不靠特效去堆江湖，改用三個排比問句把「執念」拆成三種代價——當上萬人之上，你卻要一個人走；打下天下，你卻要放手所愛；結拜了兄弟，又躲不過江湖的凶險。方向既然是「用問句逼你入戲、不是用場面轟你」，攝影就整套走留白：雪原、雁門關、遠山全是低對比的灰白冷調，霧氣壓到看不清，人縮成畫面裡極小一點——孤獨不必演，構圖本身就是孤獨。美術則用溫度說話：冷到底的雪景之間插進金黃蘆葦的黃昏、一縷紅絲、火把密室的暖光，每次回暖都對著一種代價。段譽（林志穎飾）永遠正面居中，三個問句像透過他的臉問向你。最後他在風雪裡把三杯血酒一口飲盡，答案不落在權力或愛情，落在最樸素的一句字卡：「也永遠兄弟齊心」。
works.concept_en: This film is selling an "officially licensed Jin Yong" title, but I decided from the first frame to go the other way: don't conjure a jianghu out of fights and effects — split "obsession" into three costs with three parallel questions instead. Rise above ten thousand others, and you walk alone; conquer the whole world, and you let the one you love go; swear brotherhood, and you still can't dodge the dangers of the jianghu. Since the direction is "pull you in with questions, not batter you with spectacle," the camera works entirely in negative space: snowfields, Yanmen Pass, distant peaks all in low-contrast pale grey, fog pressed down until you can barely see, the figure shrunk to a single tiny dot — solitude isn't acted, the composition itself is the solitude. The art department speaks in temperature: between the relentless cold of the snow it drops in a sunset of golden reeds, a thread of red silk, the warm torchlight of a dungeon — every return of warmth answers one of the costs. Duan Yu (played by Jimmy Lin) is always shot frontal and centered; the three questions seem to be asked through his face, at you. In the end he downs three cups of wine in the blizzard, and the answer lands not on power or love but on the plainest caption of all: "we are still a unity."

works.title_en: Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters
works.client_en: Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters
works.views_note: 原配對為官方頻道無代言人的通用 PV（l6HfuzRfLO0，36.6萬觀看），與導演頻道實際案件（高燃集結篇/斗羅時空篇，代言人：汪東城、辰亦儒、曾沛慈、張皓明）不符。已改用官方頻道同代言人陣容版本（終極一班跨時空集結篇，20.8萬觀看），與導演頻道說明欄代言人確認一致
works.views_note_en: The original match was a generic official-channel PV with no endorsers (l6HfuzRfLO0, 366K views), which didn't match the director channel's actual case (endorsers Jiro Wang, Calvin Chen, Pets Tseng, and Chang Hao-Ming). Replaced with the official-channel version featuring the same endorser lineup (208K views), consistent with the endorsers confirmed in the director channel's description
works.desc_zh: 為知名 IP《斗羅大陸：獵魂世界》執導代言廣告，找回終極一班班底汪東城、辰亦儒、曾沛慈、張皓明重返校園場景，以「宗門集結」的召喚敘事貫穿全片。
works.desc_en: Directed the endorsement campaign for the major game IP Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters, reuniting KO ONE cast members Jiro Wang, Calvin Chen, Pets Tseng, and Chang Hao-Ming in their old school setting, built around a "Sect Assembly" call-to-arms.
works.concept_zh: 這支最聰明的一步，是把代言人「本來就是兄弟」直接當賣點——他們是一起演了多年的「終極一班」，所以我不給敘舊留一秒。方向既然是「校園就是戰場」，攝影就把兩個世界壓進同一顆鏡頭：實拍的樓梯間、堆滿椅子的教室、塗鴉走廊全用自然光老實拍，緊接著紫色雷電、金色光環、戰錘、火焰就直接從演員手上、身邊長出來——實景和 CG 武魂不切成兩場，而是同框一起炸。美術更把遊戲種進校園：牆上貼的是仿遊戲介面的「戰力」「成長率」海報，把數值貼成學校公告；每格左上角「斗羅大陸 X 終極一班」的品牌卡從頭釘到尾。四人各自被一種顏色的特效纏身，最後在 CG 武魂獸群前並肩走向鏡頭——「宗門集結」不必鋪陳，因為這群人本來就是一班的。
works.concept_en: The smartest move here is taking the fact that this cast are already brothers and using it straight as the pitch — they've played the "KO One" gang together for years, so I give reunion small talk not one second. Since the direction is "the campus is the battlefield," the camera crushes two worlds into a single shot: real stairwells, a classroom piled with chairs, a graffiti corridor all shot honestly in natural light, and then purple lightning, a gold ring, a war hammer, fire grow straight out of the actors' hands and bodies — the real location and the CG martial souls aren't cut into two scenes, they go off together in the same frame. The art department plants the game into the school itself: the walls carry mock game-UI posters of "combat power" and "growth rate," pinning the game's numbers up as school notices; and the "Douluo Continent X KO One" brand card stays locked in the top-left corner of every frame. Each of the four is wrapped in a different color of effect, and they close by walking toward camera side by side before a horde of CG martial-soul beasts — "assemble the sect" needs no setup, because this crowd was always one class.

works.views_note: 越南代理商官方頻道查無公開版本，僅導演個人頻道存檔（個位數觀看），available on request
works.views_note_en: No public version found on the Vietnamese publisher's official channel; only archived on the director's personal channel (single-digit views) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《開天》執導廣告，由林志穎代言，以雲海仙山的意象扣回「開天」的世界觀命題。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Kaitian (Heaven's Gate), featuring endorser Jimmy Lin, framed around a sea-of-clouds mountaintop vision that echoes the game's own origin-myth premise.
works.concept_zh: 這支片的方向只有一件事：讓片名「開天」從一個遊戲名字，變成全片最後一個動作——所以我刻意把高潮往後拖。林志穎在片裡不演具體角色，更像一個說故事的人，用一句「若世上萬火盡滅」牽出三段記憶：床帳裡有人守著熟睡的孩子、竹林陽光下第一次對上的眼神、三人並肩扛住一道天雷——童年、初戀、結義，剪成同一種想念。方向既然是「把情緒疊到最高再一次兌現」，攝影就用溫度分開兩個世界：CG 的天地一律冷——銀白冰龍、藍色雷電、幽藍能量；人的記憶一律暖——燭光床帳、逆光金亮的竹林。冷暖來回堆疊，直到旁白說出真正的重點：「我以此劍，開闢天地。」就在這一句，畫面翻成滿幀暖金——冷了一整支片的世界，用一片金光宣告那一劍。「開天」不再是招牌上兩個字，是他手起劍落的那個動作。
works.concept_en: The direction here comes down to one thing: turn the title "Opening Heaven" from a game's name into the film's final action — so I deliberately hold the climax back. Jimmy Lin isn't playing a specific character so much as narrating; a single line, "what if every fire in the world went out," pulls up three memories: someone watching over a sleeping child behind bed curtains, a first meeting of eyes in the sunlit bamboo, three figures bracing side by side under a bolt of lightning — childhood, first love, brotherhood, all cut into the same longing. Since the direction is "stack the emotion to its peak, then cash it in once," the camera splits the two worlds by temperature: the CG heavens are all cold — a silver ice dragon, blue lightning, ghostly blue energy; the human memories are all warm — candlelit bed curtains, a bamboo grove backlit gold. Cold and warm pile up in turn until the voiceover says what it's really about: "with this sword, I carve open heaven and earth." On that line the frame floods to full warm gold — a world that stayed cold the whole film announces the stroke in a single sheet of light. "Opening Heaven" stops being two words on a logo and becomes the fall of his blade.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：徐若瑄），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Vivian Hsu) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《神魔傳說》執導廣告，由徐若瑄代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Shen Mo Chuan Shuo, featuring endorser Vivian Hsu.
works.concept_zh: 這支片的方向，是把代言做成別人做不到的事：徐若瑄（Vivian Hsu）不是掛在片尾的一張名牌，而是整條角色線走到的終點。方向既然是「用一整段黑化弧線去撐起代言」，全片就拍成一齣完整 CG 悲劇——一個活了千年的女子，從白袍在戰場上倖存，到獨自站在屍堆裡快哭出來，再到綠色魔氣纏上全身。攝影讓整支片用顏色講這條路：起手壓到灰藍、幾乎沒有彩度的死寂戰場，只有斷戈餘燼與 CG 烈焰透出一點暖；轉折不靠台詞，而是綠色魔氣整片湧進來，把畫面染成邪異螢綠。美術讓衣服替她說話——白袍是「人」，黑袍與繁複髮冠是「魔」，換一件，人就變了。「那就和我一起成魔」是全片唯一的轉折。片尾具名徐若瑄、端坐白骨王座的肖像，就是這個黑化終點本身——你記住的不是「某某明星代言了這款遊戲」，而是「這個成魔的女人，就是她」。
works.concept_en: The direction here is to make the endorsement do something most can't: Vivian Hsu isn't a name tag stuck on the last frame — she's where an entire character arc ends up. Since the direction is "carry the endorsement on one full arc of a woman turning demon," the whole film is shot as one complete CG tragedy: a woman who has lived a thousand years goes from surviving a battle in white robes, to standing alone in a field of the dead on the verge of tears, to green demonic energy wrapping her whole body. The camera tells that road through color: it opens desaturated to grey-blue, an all-but-colorless dead battlefield where only embers on a broken blade and CG flame leak a little warmth; the turn rides on no line of dialogue but on green demon-energy flooding the frame and staining everything an eerie phosphor green. The art department lets the wardrobe speak for her — white robes are "human," the black robes and ornate headdress are "demon," and one change of costume is the change of the person. "Then let it transform me into a demon" is the film's one and only turn. The end portrait, credited to Vivian Hsu, seated on a throne of white bone, is that demonic destination itself — what you remember isn't "a star endorsed this game," it's "that woman who became a demon is her."

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：林心如），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Ruby Lin) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《超爆三國志》執導廣告，由林心如代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Chao Bao San Guo Zhi, featuring endorser Ruby Lin.
works.concept_zh: 這支片的方向只有一件事：把「找明星代言」升級成「明星就是遊戲裡那個等你喚醒的英魂」——讓林心如（Ruby Lin）同時是螢幕外的代言人、也是螢幕裡被喚醒的角色。方向定了，光就分成兩個世界：開場舞台收成純黑，只一道頂光打在她本人身上，黑亮片、孤身、冷；下一鏡直接切進建安十三年赤壁滿屏橘紅的火海，暖——一冷一暖，今生與前世就被光分開。美術把赤壁做成一整座燒起的木造戰船城，紅衣戰袍的前世化身在火裡現身，跟黑裙本人同一張臉、兩套造型；一隻披甲的手觸上額頭、金色符文亮起，喚醒的儀式就成立。那圈跳出暖橘的藍紫電光是覺醒的能量、也是火鳳的顏色，最後聚成竄天的鳳凰。所以「沉寂千年的火鳳」不是形容詞，是她身分揭曉的那一刻，代言人與遊戲世界觀從此扣在一起。
works.concept_en: The whole film points at one idea: upgrade "hire a celebrity" into "this celebrity *is* the ancient heroine you're here to awaken" — so Ruby Lin is at once the endorser outside the screen and the character being woken inside it. Once that direction is set, the light splits into two worlds. It opens on a stage pulled down to pure black, a single top light on her real self — black sequins, alone, cold; the very next shot drops straight into the wall of orange fire at Red Cliffs in the thirteenth year of Jian'an — warm. Cold against warm, and present life and past life are separated by light alone. The art department builds Red Cliffs as a whole burning city of wooden warships; her red-armored past-life self rises from the flames — same face as the woman in black, two looks — and an armored hand touches her forehead as a golden sigil lights up, so the awakening ritual reads. Even the blue-violet lightning that jumps out of all that orange isn't decoration — it's the energy of "awakening" and the color of the fire phoenix, gathering at last into a phoenix tearing up into the sky. So "the fire phoenix that has slept a thousand years" isn't a description — it's the moment her identity is unveiled, locking the endorser and the game's world together for good.

works.views_note: 官方頻道「征服之路-EOC」版本觀看數（代言人吳宗憲，說明欄核實）
works.views_note_en: View count from the official channel "征服之路-EOC" (endorser Jacky Wu, confirmed via video description)
works.desc_zh: 為策略手遊《文明與征服》（官方英文名 Era of Conquest）執導廣告，由吳宗憲代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the strategy mobile game Era of Conquest (文明與征服), featuring endorser Jacky Wu.
works.concept_zh: 這支片的方向只有一個賭注：不靠代言人光環，靠他插科打諢的本能——把「文明衝突／全球大戰」這種賣點，直接演成一場靠吳宗憲（Jacky Wu）撐起的多方尬戲。方向既然是「讓不同文明擠進同一個空間互嗆」，美術就把場景做成一座厚重奢華的中式帝王大殿：黑金雲紋龍袍、串珠冕冠、龍椅寶座、金色浮雕背牆——正因為背景像認真大片，才襯得出他的喜感。再把不同文明的角色全塞進一個殿裡：中式盟主、羅馬皇帝、黑甲角鬥士、束髻武將，光是「同框」本身就在演文明衝突。攝影借正劇語法：臉部特寫抓誇張表情、手持殘影做以一敵多、俯拍煙霧混戰。他撂下「我當盟主 有誰不服」，畫面疊英文「SHUT UP」把對嗆壓成幾秒喜劇節奏。對的代言人、用對他的本事，比砸再多特效都更讓人記得住。
works.concept_en: The whole film rides on one bet: don't lean on the star's aura, lean on his instinct for a gag — staging a huge hook ("clash of civilizations / global war") as a multi-way shouting match carried entirely by Jacky Wu's comic timing. Since the direction is "cram rival civilizations into one room and let them bicker," the art department builds the set as a heavy, lavish, dead-serious Chinese imperial hall: black-and-gold cloud-pattern robes, a beaded crown, a dragon throne, bronze candelabra, a gilded relief wall — it's precisely because the backdrop looks like a straight-faced epic that his comedy pops. Then it packs characters from different civilizations into that one hall: Chinese alliance leader Jacky Wu, a laurel-wreathed, red-caped Roman emperor, a mace-swinging gladiator, a top-knotted dark-armored warrior — the mere fact that they share a frame is already the clash of civilizations playing out. The camera borrows the grammar of straight drama wholesale: tight face close-ups catching outsized expressions, handheld shake and motion-blur for a "one man against many" brawl, an overhead of the melee in the smoke. He throws down "I'm the alliance leader — who refuses to submit," and the screen slaps up an English "SHUT UP," squeezing a multi-way row into a few seconds of comic rhythm. He even says the game's name himself. It proves the point: the right spokesperson, used for what he's actually good at, sticks in your head better than any amount of effects spent explaining "global war."

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（金庸正版授權手遊，說明欄核實代言人：徐錦江），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (an officially Louis Cha-licensed mobile game; endorser confirmed via video description: Elvis Tsui) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為金庸正版授權手遊《新鹿鼎記》執導電視廣告，由徐錦江代言。
works.desc_en: Directed a TVC for the officially Louis Cha-licensed mobile game Xin Lu Ding Ji, featuring endorser Elvis Tsui.
works.concept_zh: 這支片的方向很聰明：它沒把徐錦江（Elvis Tsui）的招牌反派翻過來玩，而是加碼——鰲拜還是那個跋扈貪婪的鰲拜，只是貪的從權力換成美人和角色。方向既然是「用觀眾早就認得的反派去演收集」，美術就把他的鰲拜造型忠實還原（紅頂官帽插翎、白長鬚、繡金龍清宮官服），這張臉不用扮別人；場景是一整座華麗的清宮閨房，暖金色調、紅燈籠、博古架擺青花瓷、幔帳錦榻——奢靡本身就是「收集」的視覺。攝影：寬螢幕黑邊、泛黃懷舊調、淺景深特寫與框中框，把古裝喜劇拍成正片。建寧公主一句「用你最厲害的那招」，雙胞胎接「兩個也不夠」，把胃口推到「我全部都要」——這條越要越多的台詞鏈就是集卡玩法本身，收在他被群芳環繞的金座上。
works.concept_en: The direction here is clever: it doesn't flip Elvis Tsui's signature villain, it doubles down on him — Oboi is still the same domineering, greedy Oboi, just redirected from political power to beauties and collectible characters. Since the aim is "use a villain the audience already knows to act out collecting," the art department faithfully rebuilds Tsui's Oboi look: red official hat with a peacock plume, long white beard, a Qing court robe embroidered with golden dragons, court beads — a face that never has to pretend to be anyone else; you get it just from looking. The set is a lavish Qing-palace boudoir: warm gold tones, red lanterns, latticed windows, carved screens, a round curio shelf lined with blue-and-white porcelain, draped daybeds — the sheer opulence *is* the visual of "collection." The camera goes cinematic: widescreen letterbox bars, a warm yellowed nostalgic grade, lots of shallow-focus close-ups and frame-within-frame (watching the lounging Princess Jianning through a doorway), shooting a costume comedy like a real feature. Princess Jianning needles him with "use your most powerful move," the twins Big Shuang'er and Little Shuang'er add "two isn't enough," pushing his appetite all the way to "I want them ALL" — and that escalating chain *is* the gacha collect-the-characters loop, landing on him ringed by admirers on a golden throne. The end card names him plainly — "Oboi, Elvis Tsui" — and the pitch needs no explaining.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版_完整版（說明欄核實代言人：Selina任家萱、任容萱姊妹），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel, full cut (endorsers confirmed via video description: sisters Selina Jen and Lorene Jen) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《新仙俠：起源》執導廣告，由 Selina 任家萱與任容萱姊妹代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Xin Xianxia: Qiyuan, featuring sisters Selina Jen and Lorene Jen.
works.concept_zh: 這支片的方向，是找來一對真正的雙生姊妹（任家萱 Selina／任容萱），把她們現實裡的感情變成戲的核心——所以整支片其實用光的溫度，把兩條時間線縫成同一種情感。方向定了，美術與攝影分頭搭出三個世界：古裝仙俠是華麗古典的閨房（花鳥屏風、木格窗、圓鏡、幔帳），常打成暖橘燭火配冷藍月光；現代是溫馨居家（兒童臥房的大熊玩偶、綠檯燈，長大後的梳妝鏡臥室），走暖黃自然光；再加一層仙俠 CG 奇觀（月夜山水、藍色巨獸破海）的冷藍魔幻。攝影用電影寬螢幕、大量框中框（圓月洞門、圓鏡、窗框）和柔光淺景深，把兩個時空反覆並置，疊到分不清誰的前世。長大後的兩姊妹一古裝、一現代，並肩站進同一個溫暖房間相視而笑。找對了人，「羈絆跨越古今」這句話就不用演，它本身就是真的。
works.concept_en: The direction of this film is to cast a genuine pair of twin sisters — Selina Jen and 任容萱 — and make their real-life bond the core of the story, so the whole spot is really about using the *temperature* of light to stitch two timelines into one feeling. Once that's set, the art and camera departments build three worlds in parallel: the wuxia past is an ornate classical boudoir (bird-and-flower painted screens, latticed windows, a round mirror, candelabra, blue-and-white porcelain, vase flowers, a canopy bed) lit warm-candle against cold-moonlight; the present is a cozy home (a child's room with a giant teddy, a green lamp, a drawing table; a grown-up's arty bedroom of sheer curtains and a vanity mirror), on warm natural yellow; and a layer of wuxia CG spectacle (a moonlit landscape, a blue leviathan breaking the water, river lanterns and waterfalls) in cold-blue magic. The camera uses cinematic widescreen, heavy frame-within-frame (a moon-gate arch, a round mirror, watching through window lattice) and soft shallow focus, laying the two timelines over each other until you can't tell whose past life is whose. Grown up, the two sisters — one still in ancient robes, one in modern dress — step into the same warm room side by side and smile at each other. With the right casting, "a bond that crosses time" doesn't have to be acted — it's simply true.

works.views_note: 官方遊戲頻道「斬妖」版本觀看數（代言人陳漢典，說明欄核實）
works.views_note_en: View count from the official game channel "斬妖" (endorser Hank Chen, confirmed via video description)
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《斬妖》執導事前預約廣告，由陳漢典代言。
works.desc_en: Directed a pre-registration campaign ad for the mobile game Zhan Yao, featuring endorser Hank Chen.
works.concept_zh: 這支片的方向只賭一件事：一個諧音哏，到底能撐起多大的世界。所以我先把哏做到最尷尬、最好笑——陳漢典（Hank Chen）演的「空虛公子」，搖著一把寫「空虛」的團扇，在滿園櫻花裡自封天下第一，下一秒就被身旁婢女當眾拆穿：「你不是空虛，是腎虛。」方向既然是「讓哏自己發光」，攝影就壓低鏡頭、由下往上仰拍他，把他的自我感覺良好撐到最滿再一秒戳破；美術把江南庭園做得愈乾淨講究，公子出的糗就愈好笑。真正的看點是這哏的延伸力：它被養成一整首歌〈第一虛〉，彩色荒誕喜劇和顆粒黑白復古片段交錯剪，副歌一遍遍唱「腎虛空虛」；連潑墨字卡都特意把「腎」挑成紅色，讓你一眼看懂哏在哪。直到片尾才揭曉真正的聯動——「斬妖×西遊」，收在水墨山嵐的片名卡上。一個諧音哏，長出一支廣告、一首主題曲、一次 IP 聯動——這才是這個案子的規模。
works.concept_en: The whole film is one bet: how big a world can a single pun hold up? So I built the gag itself to be as excruciating — and as funny — as possible. Hank Chen plays "Young Master Void," draped in cream-white period robes, waving a round fan that reads "Void," crowning himself number one under heaven in a courtyard full of cherry blossoms — only to be publicly deflated a beat later by a maidservant: "You're not Void, you're Kidney-Deficient." Since the direction is "let the gag shine," the camera sits low and tilts up at him, inflating his smugness to the brim so the puncture lands harder a second later; the art department makes the Jiangnan garden as clean and refined as it can be — pink blossoms, white walls and grey tiles, a rosewood horseshoe chair — because the more elegant it all is, the funnier his humiliation reads. The real hook is how far the gag stretches: it's grown into a whole theme song, "The First Void" — color-graded absurd comedy (a wheelchair, a birthday party crossed with a funeral, a call no one answers) intercut with grainy black-and-white retro segments, the chorus looping "kidney-void, empty-void"; even the ink-splatter title cards deliberately pick the word "Kidney" out in red so you catch the joke at a glance. Only at the very end does the real crossover surface — Zhanyao × Journey to the West — landing on an ink-wash mountain title card. One pun, grown into an ad, a theme song, and an IP tie-in: that's the true scale of this campaign.

works.views_display_zh: 官方頻道系列合計 9.9萬+觀看
works.views_note: 官方頻道 4 支（宣傳MV+多慧小劇場×2+賺翻篇）合計 99,793 觀看；此為導演版存檔
works.views_note_en: Four cuts on the game's official channel total 99,793 views; this player shows the director's archived cut
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《玩賺大都會》執導廣告，由李多慧代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Wan Zhuan Da Du Hui, featuring endorser Lee Da-hye.
works.concept_zh: 這支片的方向，是把遊戲「一個人可以活出好幾種人生」的賣點，翻成一場全城矚目的奇觀：李多慧（Lee Da-hye）的每一個分身，都變成一座城市地標。方向定了，攝影的三段遞進就定了。開場用一顆乾淨俯拍，把她三個造型（辦公室女強人、啦啦隊、居家捲髮）平放在沙灘巾上排排躺，像貨架商品讓你一次比較；接著鏡頭仰起，分身一個個放大成天際線上的巨幅看板——啦啦隊版佔滿整片時代廣場式螢幕牆、創業套裝版和「多慧」名字並列——用最誇張的尺度告訴你分身有多威。高潮是會朝現實下鈔票雨的立體看板，她乾脆從螢幕裡走出來、站在復古街景裡一張張數錢。美術一路加碼：加班狗做成真的戴狗頭套坐辦公桌、復古街景配薄荷綠老爺車和霓虹，把「玩到賺到」演成一場鬧劇。分身數就等於人生數，賣點全藏在畫面裡，不用一句話解釋。
works.concept_en: The direction here takes the game's promise — "one player, many lives" — and stages it as a citywide spectacle: every one of Lee Da-hye's alter egos becomes a city landmark. Once that's set, the camera's three-step build is set too. It opens on a clean overhead shot, laying her three looks (girlboss office worker, cheerleader, curler-haired homebody) flat on beach towels side by side, like products on a shelf you compare at a glance; then the lens tilts up as each persona blows up into a giant billboard on the skyline — the cheerleader filling a whole Times-Square-style screen wall, the startup-suit version paired with her name "多慧" — sheer scale telling you how mighty these personas are. The climax is an anamorphic 3D billboard raining cash down into the real world, so she simply steps out of the screen and stands in a retro streetscape, counting bills one by one. The art keeps raising the stakes: the "overwork dog" is literally a man in a dog-head mask at an office desk, the retro street dressed with a mint-green classic car and neon, turning "play your way to riches" into pure farce. The number of personas equals the number of lives, and the whole pitch is buried in the image — no line of explanation needed.

works.views_note: 本篇單支影片 10.2萬觀看；同系列「震撼登場」全 8 支官方影片合計超過 290 萬觀看
works.views_note_en: This single cut has drawn 102K views; the full "Shocking Debut" series of 8 official videos has drawn a combined 2.9M+ views
works.desc_zh: 為國際大作《失落的方舟》（Amazon Games）執導廣告，官方系列影片合計觀看數超過 290 萬。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the major title Lost Ark (Amazon Games); the official campaign series has drawn a combined 2.9M+ views.
works.concept_zh: 這支片的方向下得很敢：不擺任何一張明星臉，讓電影級的暗黑氛圍自己當主角，證明遊戲夠暗有戲。方向是氛圍即一切，攝影只玩紅與黑——尖刺黑甲的斗篷女戰士從灰霧裡浮出，四周紅燭把她的臉削成剪影，身後煙聚成惡魔的臉、血月頂在林梢，她被血色漩渦俯捲。美術把道具都往墮落推：黑森林、滲血樹幹、紅燭儀式陣、甲冑的暗紅光，把「走進黑暗」做成緩慢確定的過程，不靠一句台詞。氛圍鋪滿之後才亮出收尾——一整排七職業選角卡展開，配字卡「選擇你的命運吧」，把只是看戲的你邀請下場當玩家；最後落在焦土上燒浮的「失落的方舟」片名。先用氛圍鎮住你，再點名拉你進局。
works.concept_en: The direction here is bold: no star's face at all — cinematic darkness itself carries the film, proving a game can sell how dark it is on mood alone. If atmosphere is everything, the camera works only in red and black: a spike-armored, cloaked warrior woman rises from grey mist, red candles carving her face to a silhouette, smoke gathering into a demon's face, a blood moon over the treeline, a red spiral swallowing her. The art pushes every prop toward the fall — black forest, blood-weeping trunks, a ritual ring of red candles, dark-red light over her armor — turning "the descent into darkness" into one slow, certain process, with no line of dialogue. Only once the mood is full does the film play its closer: a row of seven class-select cards fans open under one line — "Choose your fate" — and the viewer who was only watching is invited in as the player. It lands on the title "Lost Ark" burning across scorched earth. No star's face, yet it pins you with atmosphere first, then calls your name into the game.

_removed_works.title_zh: RO仙境傳說：初心之戰《律師篇》
_removed_works.client: RO 仙境傳說：初心之戰
_removed_works.views_note: 原配對案名誤植為「曙光」，鄭又勛導演作品頻道實際收錄的是《RO仙境傳說：初心之戰》（醫師篇/教授篇/律師篇三支），查無「曙光」。已改為官方頻道（GRAVITY COMMUNICATIONS）同案「律師篇_15秒」版本，與導演頻道律師篇（9uJV8x3Foq4，導演:鄭又勛）標題一致確認
_removed_works.views_note_en: The original pairing mislabeled the case as "Dawn"; the director's own channel actually lists Ragnarok Online: The First Fight ("Doctor"/"Professor"/"Lawyer" cuts) with no "Dawn" entry. Replaced with the official channel's (GRAVITY COMMUNICATIONS) "Lawyer_15s" cut of the same case, confirmed consistent with the "Lawyer" cut on the director's channel (9uJV8x3Foq4, director: York Cheng)
_removed_works.desc_zh: 為經典大型 IP《仙境傳說：初心之戰》執導廣告（律師篇），官方頻道累積超過 28 萬觀看。
_removed_works.desc_en: Directed an ad ("Lawyer" cut) for the classic large-scale IP Ragnarok Online: The First Fight, drawing 280K+ views on its official channel.
_removed_works._removed_reason: 2026-07-19 York 拍板終版名單：品牌主軸+遊戲輔軸 16 部，此案不在遊戲輔軸 11 部之列
